---
title: "Academic Performance"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Undergraduate

XJTLU————Financial Mathematics\
Overall GPA: #/4.0

| Year    | Avg Marks | Rank | Scholarship                     |
|---------|-----------|------|---------------------------------|
| 2022-23 | 83.62     | 1    | Academic Excellence Scholarship |
| 2023-24 | \#        | \#   | \#                              |
| 2024-25 | \#        | \#   | \#                              |
| 2025-26 | \#        | \#   | not offer Scholarship           |
